api_key.description: Thinkific API key, sent as the X-Auth-API-Key header. Never logged.

subdomain.description: Thinkific account subdomain, sent as the X-Auth-Subdomain header.

base_url.description: Thinkific public API base URL override for tests or proxies.

bundle_id.description: Bundle ID for bundle detail, courses, enrollments, and bundle enrollment writes.

chapter_id.description: Chapter ID for chapter detail and contents streams.

collection_id.description: Category/collection ID for category streams and writes.

coupon_id.description: Coupon ID for coupon detail/update/delete actions.

content_id.description: Content ID for content detail streams.

course_id.description: Course ID for course detail, course chapters, reviews, and course-scoped filters.

enrollment_id.description: Enrollment ID for enrollment detail/update actions.

group_id.description: Group ID for group detail, analysts, and group membership actions.

instructor_id.description: Instructor ID for instructor detail/update/delete actions.

order_id.description: Order ID for order detail streams.

product_id.description: Product ID for product detail, related products, and promotion coupon lookup.

product_publish_request_id.description: Product publish request ID for detail and approve/deny actions.

promotion_id.description: Promotion ID for coupon filters and promotion detail/update/delete actions.

coupon_code.description: Coupon code for the promotion_by_coupon stream.

course_review_id.description: Course review ID for review detail streams.

user_id.description: User ID for user detail/authentication streams and user/group actions.

provider.description: Authentication provider key for the user_authentication stream.

site_script_id.description: Site script ID for site script detail/update/delete actions.
